evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 37290112. 2023/07/01 00:00. BACKGROUND:  Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is an examination method for 
noninvasive soft tissue imaging without the use of ionizing radiation. Metallic 
implants, however, may pose a risk for the patient and often result in imaging 
artifacts. Due to the increasing number of implants, reducing these artifacts 
has become an important goal. In this review, we describe the risks associated 
with implants and provide the background on how metal-induced art
